meta.phase-name: Model-Driven Space Selection and Tree Authoring

phase-summary.outcome: Model Space controls now include an explicit model selector using the runtime schema list (same source backing model tree), and the model tree modal supports creating new model schemas using current model as template.

file.description: Added model picker, schema-derived space options, and in-modal create-model inputs.

tests.test: TypeScript typecheck passes after model-selection and modal authoring changes.
